summary: Tested My Family My Life full-stack app. 18/18 backend pytest tests pass (users, event-types CRUD, events CRUD with year/month + user_id filtering, 404 paths, manifest.json, service-worker.js). Frontend Playwright e2e flow covers Dashboard 3 cards, navigation to /time-plan, calendar grid (42 cells), New Event dialog -> persistence -> event bar appearing in correct day cell, day popover (Radix Popover, not bottom panel) with add/edit/delete, merge toggle (split borders + disabled user switcher + wife/husband add buttons), Event Types dialog CRUD, prev/next/today navigation, back to dashboard. All flows working end-to-end.

issues: Radix warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' on EventDialog and EventTypesDialog. Accessibility-only, non-blocking. Add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby={undefined} explicit prop.

action_items: (Optional) Add <DialogDescription> to EventDialog and EventTypesDialog to silence Radix a11y warning.
(Optional) Clean up created UI_Test_Cat category in the database (it was left after the frontend test run; harmless, just visible in Event Types list).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to lifespan context manager for future FastAPI versions.
TimePlan.jsx is ~460 lines; still under 700 threshold but approaching split point.
Backend exposes all routes without auth — by design (no auth), but anyone hitting the public URL can mutate data. Acceptable for current MVP scope.
api.js silently swallows POST/PUT/DELETE errors only for GETs (cache fallback). Mutating operations correctly bubble errors to toast.error — good.
test_credentials: Not applicable — no auth; two seeded users id='wife' and id='husband'.
seed_data_creation: Backend startup auto-seeds wife (#F472B6) and husband (#60A5FA) users. No additional seed needed. Test data created and cleaned up within tests (TEST_ prefix on backend; one UI_Test_Cat category left from frontend run).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. All 18 cases pass. Frontend live URL https://family-timeplan.preview.emergentagent.com loads instantly. All data-testid attributes match the spec. Merge toggle properly disables user switcher (pointer-events-none). Popover (not bottom panel) confirmed via [data-testid='day-popover-{iso}']. PWA /manifest.json and /service-worker.js are served (200).
